docket_entries.description: CONT. REQUEST FILED BY DEFEND. AND SENT TO COURT.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-12-1997, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO OCT-17-1997 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
ORIGINALLY JUDGE DENIED CONT. W/O PREJUDICE, NO PROOF OF NOTICE TO PLTFFS, BUT THIS OVERRULED SINCE THERE WAS PROOF. (SEE NOTE STICKERS).
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DALEY, JOAN DBA TRAVEL DIRECTORS, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BIRKENFELD, CAROL LONG, JENNIFER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DALEY, JOAN DBA TRAVEL DIRECTORS, INC. $642.55 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $657.55 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
REM: AMENDED POS. FILED IN COURT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $642.55 FILED BY BIRKENFELD, CAROL LONG, JENNIFER AS TO DEFENDANT DALEY, JOAN DBA TRAVEL DIRECTORS, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-12-1997 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
